engine_parts_desc: Engine blocks, pistons, cylinders, valves, timing belts, gaskets, and related internal components.
braking_system_desc: Brake pads, rotors, calipers, master cylinders, brake lines, and ABS components.
suspension_steering_desc: Shock absorbers, struts, control arms, ball joints, tie rods, and steering racks.
transmission_gearbox_desc: Gearboxes, clutches, torque converters, axles, differentials, and CV joints.
electrical_lighting_desc: Alternators, starters, batteries, wiring harnesses, lights, sensors, and ECUs.
body_panels_desc: Fenders, doors, hoods, bumpers, grilles, mirrors, and exterior trim pieces.
cooling_heating_desc: Radiators, water pumps, thermostats, heaters, AC compressors, and condensers.
filters_fluids_desc: Oil filters, air filters, fuel filters, cabin filters, engine oils, and coolants.
exhaust_system_desc: Exhaust manifolds, catalytic converters, mufflers, pipes, and oxygen sensors.
wheels_tires_desc: Alloy wheels, steel rims, hubcaps, tires, tire pressure sensors, and lug nuts.
interior_accessories_desc: Seats, dashboards, carpets, steering wheels, infotainment systems, and trim panels.
tools_workshop_desc: Diagnostic tools, jacks, stands, tool kits, compressors, and workshop equipment.
